rules.rule_text:
rule LONGRUN_APT1
{
	meta:
		author = "AlienVault Labs"
		info = "CommentCrew-threat-apt1"

	strings:
		$s1 = "Mozilla/4.0 (compatible; Windows NT 5.1; MSIE 7.0; Trident/4.0)" wide ascii
		$s2 = "%s\\%c%c%c%c%c%c%c" wide ascii
		$s3 = "wait:" wide ascii
		$s4 = "Dcryption Error! Invalid Character" wide ascii

	condition:
		all of them
}
